title: So what we heard about Asuka true or not
display_title: So what we heard about Asuka true or not
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] So, what we heard about Asuka, true or not? Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:40 pm a lot of people speculated that Asuka was an angel due to what happened in 2.0 there is still 4.0 though and anything could happen.....has it been proven that there is no way in hell at this point that shes an angel? i heard that in 3.0 she did say the word "lilin" which is what karouw called humans right? ( in the show when he was an angel)....i sure hope to god Asuka isnt an angel that would ruin everything

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:43 pm In 1.0, Misato showed Lilith to Shinji and told him it was the progenitor of humanity. Given that Misato (and even more to the point, Ritsuko) are involved with Wille, I think it's safe to say that Lilith and most of Nerv's other secrets are out of the bag at this point, so use of the word Lilim isn't necessarily indicative of anything more than Asuka having knowledge of the inside scoop for once.

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:46 pm Yeah, Asuka's been hanging around Wille for 14 years and she was always pretty well-informed even in NGE/EoE. The spoilers that claimed Asuka was an Angel claimed that she was the 13th Angel, which is why Shinji and Kaworu were fighting her. However, it's obvious now that this is not the case and Kaworu identifies himself as the 13th Angel during the fight. So it's pretty safe to say that's been debunked.

[]: Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Sun Nov 18, 2012 7:46 pm thank god. im ok with them making huge changes like 3.0 being 14 years ahead, having Asuka play with a doll, having Shinji grow balls, Misato somewhat hating Shinji, Rei not being a doll....but Asuka being an angel?.....too far

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:02 pm To be honest, even if Asuka did become some sort of human/angel hybrid due to Bardiel, that was 14 years ago at this point. I think everyone would have to be pretty damn sure by now that she's not a threat.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 18, 2012 8:12 pm Fake spoilers were fake. Locking thread.
